_comment: Allow/deny fixture for the compliance guard (citations.block_advice), reliability-spec §3. allow[] = descriptive market vocabulary that MUST flow freely (block_advice False); deny[] = transact instructions / ratings that MUST be blocked (block_advice True). Extend over time as novel advisory phrasing appears.
allow: Sell-side consensus expects 30% data-center growth this year.
The company announced a $50B buyback in the latest filing.
Over a multi-year holding period, the thesis compounds.
Buyers returned to the name after the post-earnings dip.
The bull case rests on durable margin expansion.
Management reiterated its long-term revenue targets.
Holders benefit from the reinstated dividend.
We rate the disclosure quality as high for this issuer.
Investors should consider the China export-control risk before sizing.
The stock sold off on the guidance cut.
deny: Go long ahead of the print.
Set a $200 price target and buy.
Exit the position before the quarter.
